zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Whetehill, Knight於1410年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾易阿爾斯 巴頓時，他的父親Sir Richard Whetehill, Knight27歲，母親Joan Astley29歲。他於1450年與Joan Marrow結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和10個女兒的父母。他去世於1485年3月4日在英國諾薩普頓史爾享年75歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Richard Whetehill, Knight于1410年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾易阿爾斯 巴頓时，他的父亲Sir Richard Whetehill, Knight27岁，母亲Joan Astley29岁。他于1450年与Joan Marrow结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和10个女儿的父母。他去世于1485年3月4日在英国諾薩普頓史爾享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: Whetehill,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Renfrewshire, Bute, and Lanarkshire) and English (Lancashire): habitational name from any of various minor places called Whitehill, in Scotland, northern England, and elsewhere.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Whetehill, Knight was born in 1410, in Earls Barton, Northamptonshire, England, his father, Sir Richard Whetehill, Knight, was 27 and his mother, Joan Astley, was 29. He married Joan Marrow in 1450. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 10 daughters. He died on 4 March 1485, in Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 75.

Il a épousé Joan Marrow en 1450. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 10 filles. Il est décédé le 4 mars 1485, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 75 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Whetehill, Knight(이)가 1410년 영국 노르섬프토실르 에를스 바턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard Whetehill, Knight(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Astley(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1450년 Joan Marrow(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 열 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1485년 3월 4일 영국 노르섬프토실르에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard Whetehill, Knight родился в 1410 г. в местности эарлс бартон, нортамптоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Richard Whetehill, Knight было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Astley, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Marrow в 1450 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 10 дочерей. Он умер 4 марта 1485 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 75 лет.
